origin.history: The prototype exists because the command BUILD_ISOLATED_ARENA_VISUAL_SHELL_PROTOTYPE asked for a standalone visual shell, where the owner's actual intent was to strengthen the existing Arena while keeping its real structure. The owner has recorded that as a command-authoring error, not an Ember decision.
origin.explicitly_not: A new frontend, and not a branch to be merged into main.
origin.merge_policy: design/arena-visual-shell-prototype must never be merged into main. Nothing is copied from it verbatim; each borrowed idea is re-expressed against existing components and official tokens.

accepted_from_the_prototype.idea: Challenger left, Crown Holder centre, opponent right in one connected band over the floor.
accepted_from_the_prototype.reason: Removes the dead centre and matches product contract section 12.

accepted_from_the_prototype.idea: Side panels connect to the stage architecture instead of floating as detached cards.
accepted_from_the_prototype.reason: The page currently reads as separate interface blocks rather than one Arena.

accepted_from_the_prototype.idea: One lower rail closes the frame and collects status and actions.
accepted_from_the_prototype.reason: Removes isolated floating controls at the bottom edge.

accepted_from_the_prototype.idea: Challenge - Combat - Biathlon - Cooking - Review - Voting - Crown across the top.
accepted_from_the_prototype.reason: Server battle statuses already exist; the viewer gains orientation at near-zero cost.

accepted_from_the_prototype.idea: The complete eight-rank progression stays visible at every width.
accepted_from_the_prototype.reason: Independently reached by Stage 3E and already shipped in commit 2fd70161.

rejected_from_the_prototype.rejected: 37 self-named tokens (--arena-night-*, --arena-gold-*, --arena-floor-*, own green #1f6842 and red #a33d35).
rejected_from_the_prototype.reason: A parallel visual system detached from the design system is prohibited by product contract section 12 and technical standards section 7.
rejected_from_the_prototype.replacement: Official CulinEire tokens; where no official equivalent exists, a centrally defined official named Arena token.

rejected_from_the_prototype.rejected: A self-drawn K mark in the masthead.
rejected_from_the_prototype.reason: The project has an official brand asset.
Not part of the design system.

rejected_from_the_prototype.rejected: A round/elliptical floor with the octagon demoted to a decorative clip-path in the logo.
rejected_from_the_prototype.reason: The Arena floor is a flat-sided octagon in the authoritative geometry: selectors.get_arena_geometry() returns sides: 8 and every ring holds a whole number of cells per octant. A round floor cannot carry the 8 rings of 40/48/56/64/72/80/88/96 seats.

rejected_from_the_prototype.rejected: Crowd energy represented only by abstract aria-hidden light texture, with no seats at all.
rejected_from_the_prototype.reason: Product contract section 12 requires the eight interactive rings and 544 real-viewer seats to coexist with non-impersonating atmosphere. The prototype resolved that tension by deleting one side of it, which would silently cancel workstream 3C.

rejected_from_the_prototype.rejected: Participant binding / Rank position / Activity position placeholders.
rejected_from_the_prototype.reason: Correct for an isolated prototype, meaningless in production.

already_correct_in_the_prototype.detail: --font-display Playfair Display and --font-interface Inter are already the official faces. Nothing to change. Libre Bodoni is introduced only on an explicit owner decision.
No application file was modified; the whole prototype lives under ops/prototypes/.
conflict_map.json marks templates/chef_battle/arena.html and static/css/arena_command_deck.css as HIGH future overlap and instructs that Stage 3E tests must not be rewritten or weakened.

working_principle: One layer, one branch, one gate, one journal entry. No single large design merge. Every slice must end in a state that can be deployed or reverted with one git revert. Reason: the Arena is already deployed under dark launch, 3A and 3B carry verified evidence, and _arena_render_ring.html is shared with the Arena Master Console.

slices.title: Component correspondence map
slices.content: For each prototype block: target existing component, action (replaces / improves / discarded), the official token replacing the prototype token, and the risk to existing behaviour.
slices.gate: Owner approval of the map. R1 does not start until the map is approved.

slices.title: Tokens
files: the Arena stylesheets that consume the tokens
slices.rule: Zero raw hex/rgb/hsl in Arena rules. The Stage 3E test test_rank_column_uses_tokens_not_raw_colour_literals is extended to cover the new rules.
slices.reason_for_ordering: Colour is the only change that alters the whole Arena at once. Isolated first, a palette error is immediately visible and revertible without dragging markup with it.
slices.rollback: git revert of the single commit.

slices.title: Stage frame - rails and lower broadcast bar
slices.hard_constraint: Panel data, links, event handlers and DOM targets are not touched. The frame changes, the contents do not. Technical standards section 6 requires one event owner per behaviour.
slices.reason_for_ordering: Pure wrapper work: the largest share of the presence effect at the lowest risk.
slices.rollback: git revert of the single commit.

slices.title: Confrontation band
slices.data: Real participant name and photo from RecipeAuthor.display_avatar_url. No placeholders.
slices.country_flag: OUT OF SCOPE - blocked on owner decision D3. The composition must accept a flag later without being rebuilt.
slices.relation_to_3D: Closes the compositional half of 3D. 3D itself stays OPEN until the country data source is decided.
gate: Production has no active battle and creating a demo battle is prohibited by AGENTS.md section 8, so the live-battle path is verified server-side, and that limitation is recorded rather than smoothed over
slices.rollback: git revert of the single commit.

slices.title: Rank column placement
slices.status: IN PROGRESS — Owner D1 Option B

option_B.cost: Rework of 3E/3G polish placement toward Ember rank-progression composition; keep ArenaRankColumnTests semantics (8 ranks, ol, mobile visibility, token contrast).
option_B.constraint: Ember's own conflict_map.json instructs that Stage 3E acceptance tests must not be weakened.

slices.owner_ruling_2026_07_24: Option B — redo the GreenBear recommendation; centred stack from ops/prototypes/arena_visual_shell rank-progression.
slices.greenbear_recommendation: Option A (historical). Owner overturned: Option B.

if_stands_stay.work: The prototype's light texture becomes an atmospheric layer UNDER the real rings. Real seats stay interactive. Synthetic figures are drawn only in free seats and never impersonate a user. The renderer starts taking seating from ArenaSeat instead of the transient _get_spectators list.
if_stands_stay.open_sub_question: May a viewer choose a specific free seat, or is the front-most free seat always assigned? Only assignment is implemented.

if_stands_removed.work: 3C is closed as removed from scope, the branch remains an artifact, migration 0084 never reaches production.
if_stands_removed.requirement: This must be recorded as an explicit owner decision, not quietly dropped.

slices.title: Phase stepper
slices.data: Existing server-authoritative battle statuses. No new data, no new model.
slices.reason_for_ordering: Cheapest and safest - the natural finishing pass once the heavy layers have settled.

gates_common_to_every_slice: Targeted tests for the slice pass.
manage.py check clean, plus migration checks when migrations exist.
Responsive at 1920 / 768 / 390 with no document-level horizontal overflow.
Accessibility: semantics, keyboard operation, visible focus, prefers-reduced-motion, and contrast recorded numerically.
Distributed 8:6:1 verification with a shared TEST_RUN_ID before integration into main (AGENTS.md section 9).
Arena Master Console compatibility checked on any slice touching _arena_render_ring.html or shared styles (product contract section 13).
Dark launch preserved: staff/superuser only. No slice may widen Arena access.

journals.rule: Every slice is recorded in all three records.

targets.content: version, date, commit, changed files, what was verified, what was NOT verified, rollback
workstream 3G slice status, branch, commit, evidence, next_action
contrast numbers, viewport results, screenshots, the correspondence map

journals.honesty_rule: Anything not verified is stated plainly, in the manner of the 3B record that keeps the unexercised live-battle tile click path visible.

open_decisions_blocking_progress.question: Rank column: keep the existing side column (A) or adopt the prototype's centred stack (B)?
open_decisions_blocking_progress.resolved: Option B — Owner 2026-07-24 (redo plan recommendation; centred stack).

open_decisions_blocking_progress.question: Do the stands stay? 544 real seats plus non-impersonating atmosphere, or a clean floor with 3C removed from scope?
open_decisions_blocking_progress.note: Must be settled before R5 begins, or the frame is laid twice.

open_decisions_blocking_progress.question: Country/flag data source - select or reject.
open_decisions_blocking_progress.note: RecipeAuthor has no approved country field. Pre-existing blocker, not introduced by 3G.

open_decisions_blocking_progress.question: Distributed 8:6:1 gate: wake Bolt and Ember, or issue an explicit written exemption from AGENTS.md section 9 per slice?
open_decisions_blocking_progress.note: This session reaches one machine and has no CoWork channel. Running the whole suite serially on one box and calling it a gate would be a constitution breach dressed as a green result.

sequence: R0 -> R1 -> R2 -> R3 -> R6, with R4 and R5 resolved by owner decision alongside. R4 and R5 do not block R1-R3.
explicit_non_goals: No merge of design/arena-visual-shell-prototype into main.
No verbatim copying of prototype CSS.
No removal of _arena_render_ring.html or of suspected legacy Arena code.
No claim that any Stage 3 workstream is complete by virtue of this plan existing.
